root_cause: Container repeatedly stuck Terminating beyond grace period

causes.message: Container failed to terminate within terminationGracePeriodSeconds
Kubelet forcibly killed the container after grace timeout

pod:grace-period-pod: Container stuck Terminating beyond grace period
